<!-- indicator: tbl-uc-impact-mhsu -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: tbl-uc-impact-mhsu
#| tbl-cap: 'The Impact of Mental Wellbeing & Substance Use in Ulster County (n = 67)'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_table_object
render_table_object(object_id="tbl-uc-impact-mhsu", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
from IPython.display import Markdown, display
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_source_callout_for_object
display(Markdown(render_source_callout_for_object("tbl-uc-impact-mhsu", CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)))
```
